workspace.heading: Workspace
workspace.exportDescription: Download a full backup of this browser — every form and attachment, plus your Central server settings and publish history — as one .formforge.zip archive.
workspace.includeCredentialsHint: Unlock the credential vault to include your saved Central passwords.
workspace.credentialWarning: The backup file will contain your saved Central passwords (encrypted with your vault passphrase). Anyone with the file and your passphrase can use them — store it somewhere safe and don't share it.
workspace.importDescription: Restore forms and Central settings from a .formforge.zip archive. Importing never overwrites existing forms.

language.heading: Language
language.label: App language
language.appLanguageNote: Changes the language of the builder interface only. Translations of the forms you build are managed per form in the editor.

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.appearanceNote: Recolours the builder and the live preview. Saved on this device only.

about.heading: About
about.storagePersistent: Storage: persistent — the browser will not clear your forms under storage pressure.
about.storageNotPersistent: Storage: best effort — the browser may clear data under storage pressure. Export a workspace backup to be safe.
about.storageUnknown: Storage: persistence status is unavailable in this browser.
